channel.title: GoldPriceTools — Gold & Silver Market News
channel.description: Live gold and silver market news, price moves and analysis from the GoldPriceTools editorial team.

item.title: Gold Price Per Ounce Today: Live Spot Rate, Calculator & Troy Ounce Explained
item.description: See the live gold price per ounce today, use our gold ounce calculator to find melt value, and learn the troy ounce vs. ounce difference before you buy or sell.

item.title: Gold Holds Above $4,500 as the Fed Signals a Pause
item.description: Bullion steadied near multi-month highs after policymakers hinted rate cuts may slow, keeping real yields and the dollar in focus.

item.title: Weekly Wrap: Gold Eases, Silver Shines, Ratio Falls
item.description: Your 60-second read on the precious-metals moves that mattered this week and the levels to watch next.

item.title: Silver Surges 4% on Industrial and Solar Demand
item.description: A tightening physical market and record solar installations pushed silver to its best week since March.

item.title: The Gold-to-Silver Ratio Just Narrowed to 62 — Here's Why
item.description: The ratio's slide signals silver outperformance. We unpack what the gold-silver ratio is telling investors now.

item.title: Central Banks Bought 290 Tonnes of Gold in Q2
item.description: Official-sector demand stayed elevated as emerging-market banks kept diversifying reserves away from the dollar.

item.title: UK Physical Gold Demand Hits a Three-Year High
item.description: Royal Mint sales and ISA-eligible coins drove a surge in retail buying across Britain this quarter.

item.title: Silver Coins for Beginners: Junk Silver to Britannias
item.description: A practical guide to the most accessible entry point into precious metals — and the VAT traps to avoid.

item.title: Platinum vs Gold: The 2026 Relative-Value Case
item.description: With the platinum discount near record extremes, contrarians are circling. We weigh the trade.

item.title: Why Miners Lagged Bullion — and Whether That Lasts
item.description: Gold equities have trailed the metal again. Cost inflation and capital discipline explain the gap.
